// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly;

/// <summary>
/// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
/// </summary>
public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Registers all default services.
    /// </summary>
    public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.MyHandler, global::TestNamespace.MyHandler>();
        services.AddScoped<global::TestNamespace.IHandler<global::TestNamespace.MyRequest, string>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
        {
            var s0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.MyHandler>();
            var s1 = new global::TestNamespace.ValidationDecorator<global::TestNamespace.MyRequest, string>(s0);
            var s2 = new global::TestNamespace.LoggingDecorator<global::TestNamespace.MyRequest, string>(s1);
            return s2;
        });

        return services;
    }
}
